member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Background
member.summary: Gets or sets the background for the badge. This property will be set only if BadgeType is set to BadgeType.None.
member.value: Specifies the background color of the badge. The default value is Colors.Transparent.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.StrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke thickness for the badge. The stroke thickness will be visible only if the stroke is not set to transparent.
member.value: Specifies the stroke thickness of the badge. The default value is 0d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.CornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius of the badge.
member.value: Specifies the corner radius of the badge. The default value is CornerRadius(25).

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Stroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke for the badge.
member.value: Specifies the stroke of the badge. The default value is Colors.Transparent.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position where the badge will be shown relative to the Content.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the position of the badge relative to the content. The default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for offset.
member.value: Specifies the offset of the badge. The default value is Point(2, 2).

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Animation
member.summary: Gets or sets the animation that should be used when the badge is shown.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the animation of the badge when the badge is shown. The default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the badge. BadgeSettings.BackgroundColor is not applied when this property set other than BadgeIcon.None.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the type of the badge. The default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.TextPadding
member.summary: Gets or sets the padding around the text of the badge.
member.value: Specifies the text padding around the text of the badge. The default value is Thickness(3) for UWP and Thickness(5) for other platforms.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.AutoHide
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the badge text is AutoHide or not.
member.value: Specifies the value for auto-hide of the badge when the value is zero or empty. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.BadgeAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for badge alignment.
member.value: Specifies the value for alignment of the badge. The default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.FontSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the font size of the text to be displayed in badge over the control.
member.value: Specifies the font size of the badge text. The default value is -1d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.FontAttributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the font attributes of the text to be displayed in badge over the control.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the font attributes of badge text. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.FontFamily
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family of the text to be displayed in badge over the control. The property will be set only if BadgeIcon is set to BadgeIcon.None.
member.value: Specifies the font family of the badge text. The default value is an empty string.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.TextColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color of the text to be displayed in badge over the control.
member.value: Specifies the text color of the badge text. The default value is Colors.White.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to adjust the duration of the badge animation.
member.value: It accepts double values, and the default value is 250ms.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Syncfusion#Maui#Graphics#Internals#ITextElement#Font
member.summary: Gets the font of the badge text.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the Icon to be displayed in the badge. BadgeText and BadgeSettings.FontFamily is not applied when this property is set other than BadgeIcon.None.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the icon of the badge. The default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.BadgeSettings.IsVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the badges.

member.summary: High transparency, low blur. Best for interactive elements like hover or selection.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfGlassEffectView
member.summary: Represents a view that overlays a platform-rendered Liquid Glass effect, adding translucent blur and depth to its content.
member.remarks: To apply the effect to a control, wrap it inside and set the control's background to transparent. This ensures the effect layer remains visible behind the control's content. This class is only recognized on the iOS/Mac Catalyst platforms; other platforms will ignore it and behave like a Content View.

SfBusyIndicator busyIndicator = new SfBusyIndicator() { AnimationType = AnimationType.CircularMaterial, Title = "Circular Material", IsRunning = true, IndicatorColor = Colors.Aqua, }; this.Content = busyIndicator;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfBusyIndicator.DurationFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration of the indicator animation.
member.value: Specifies the duration of the indicator animation. The default value is 0.5d.
member.example:
# [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<sf:SfBusyIndicator IsRunning="True" AnimationType="CircularMaterial" Title="BusyIndicator" DurationFactor="1"/>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
SfBusyIndicator busyIndicator = new SfBusyIndicator() { AnimationType = AnimationType.CircularMaterial, Title = "BusyIndicator", IsRunning = true, DurationFactor = 1, }; this.Content = busyIndicator;
***

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether enable virtualization or not.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value of LoadMoreItemsCount. By using the LoadMoreItemsCount property, numerous items can be separated.

member.summary: Gets or sets the item to be in a selected state and to be the center item of the control among the user input.

member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of type carousel items that can be rendered with different view for each item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.LoadMoreView
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the LoadMoreView. By using this property, custom view can be passed instead of the LoadMore label.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.ItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets an instance of the Template class that defines the visual structure of a Carousel item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.ViewMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the mode used to arrange the items as default 3D view or in a horizontal stacked layout.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.ItemSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the ItemSpacing. This property can be used to apply space between each item. Apply only in linear view mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.RotationAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of RotationAngle. It is an angle that tilts the unselected items. Apply only in the Default view mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of Offset. This property can be used to give the space between each item in the Default view mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.ScaleOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of Offset. It is a scaling ratio to differentiate unselected items in the Default view mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.SelectedItemOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of SelectedItemOffset. It gives space between the selected and unselected items in the Default view mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of Duration. This property can be used to give delay on selection animation.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.ItemWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of ItemWidth. This property can be used to customize the width of each carousel item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Carousel.ICarousel.ItemHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the ItemHeight. This property can be used to customize the height of each carousel item.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.ChoiceMode.SingleOrNone
member.summary: It enables to select only one chip item at a time. If you select any new item, the previously selected one is deselect and new item changed to selected state. Unlike , it is possible to deselect the selected item and keep all the items in an in deselected state.

member.summary: Gets or sets the initial zoom that will be applied, when a double tap occurrs. The default value is 1.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.DoubleTapSettings.ZoomDeltaPercent
member.summary: Gets or sets the percentage of the zoom that has to be increased, when a double tap occurs at the . The default value is 100 and it indicates that the default zoom will be doubled.

member.summary: Represents the settings for mouse wheel zoom.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.MouseWheelSettings.ZoomKeyModifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the modifer key to use for mouse wheel zooming. The default value is which means that the zoom can be changed using mouse wheel scroll, without using a modifier key.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.MouseWheelSettings.ZoomDeltaPercent
member.summary: Gets or sets the percent of zoom to be increased or decreased from the current zoom factor on mouse wheel is scrolled.
member.value: The value is expressed as a percentage and the default value is 25. If the current zoom factor is 1 and zooming in is performed, the zoom factor will be increased to 1.25. If the current zoom factor is 1 and zooming out is performed, the zoom factor will be decreased to 0.8.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.IsScrolling
member.summary: Detects whether the scrolling is in progress, to prevent conflicts with other interactions like panning. It works for Windows only.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.IsContentLayoutRequested
member.summary: It enables the scroll request to be delayed until the platform view size or load request is processed.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ZoomLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the desired location at which the zoom should occur. The default value is and it means that the zoom takes place at the pointer position. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollYProportion
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertically scrolled distance in proportional. The value ranges from 0 to 1. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollXProportion
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontally scrolled distance in proportional. The value ranges from 0 to 1. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ViewportHeight
member.summary: Gets the vertical size of the viewport. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ViewportWidth
member.summary: Gets the horizontal size of the viewport. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.MinZoomFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the minimum zoom factor permitted for the content. The default value is 0.1.
member.remarks: The value should not exceed the .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.MaxZoomFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum zoom factor permitted for the content. The default value is 10.
member.remarks: The value should not be lower than .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.DoubleTapSettings
member.summary: Gets the default double tap gesture settings used for zoom. It allows you to change the default options.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.VerticalScrollBarVisibility
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether the vertical scroll bar is visible. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether the horizontal scroll bar is visible. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.Orientation
member.summary: Gets or sets the scrolling direction of the scroll view. The default value is and it allows scroll both vertically and horizontally. The scrolling can be disabled by setting the value to . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ContentSize
member.summary: Gets the current logical horizontal and vertical size of the scrollable area. The returned value is described in device-independent units.
member.remarks: This extent size is set during the layout phase.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ExtentSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the overall logical horizontal and vertical size of the scrollable area. The value is described in device-independent units. This is a bindable property.
member.remarks: To prevent layout calls for each UI update during virtualization (or) an asynchronous process, it is advised to specify the total scrollable area using the property at the beginning itself.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollY
member.summary: Gets the distance that the content has been scrolled vertically. The returned value is described in device-independent units. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollX
member.summary: Gets the distance that the content has been scrolled horizontally. The returned value is described in device-independent units. This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ZoomFactor
member.summary: Gets the current zoom factor. This is a bindable property. The value 1 indicates that no additional scaling is applied. To modify the zoom value of the control, use method.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the view to display in the . This is a bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.AllowZoom
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to allow the content zooming. If false, content zooming will not be allowed. This is a bindable property. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.SuppressAutoScroll
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the scroll can be permitted or not when focus on child element. 925053 To restrict unwanted auto scroll in zoomed state.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ZoomBy(System.Double,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point})
member.summary: Zooms the content by the specified factor at the given origin.
member.param: The factor by which the content to be zoomed.
The origin location from which the zoom must be performed. The default origin location is the left top of the content.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollToAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a task that scrolls the scroll view to a position asynchronously.
member.param: The distance to which the control scrolls horizontally. The value is measured in device-independent units.
The distance to which the control scrolls vertically. The value is measured in device-independent units.
It indicates whether to animate the scroll. The default value is true.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollByAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a task that scrolls the scroll view by a position asynchronously.
member.param: The distance by which the control scrolls horizontally. The value is measured in device-independent units.
The distance by which the control scrolls vertically. The value is measured in device-independent units.
It indicates whether to animate the scroll. The default value is true.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollToX(System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Scrolls the control horizontally to the specific offset value.
member.param: The offset value to which the control scrolls horizontally.
It is an optional parameter which indicates whether or not to animate the scroll. The default value is true.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ScrollToY(System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Scrolls the control vertically to the specific offset value.
member.param: The offset value to which the control scrolls vertically.
It is an optional parameter which indicates whether or not to animate the scroll. The default value is true.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfInteractiveScrollView.ZoomTo(System.Double,System.Nullable{Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point})
member.summary: Updates the to the specified factor and triggers the zoom events.
member.param: The desired zoom factor. The applicable value ranges from to .
It is an optional parameter, specifies origin point in the control from which the zoom to be occurred. The default origin location is the left top of the content.

member.summary: This interface used to call the OnKeyDown method.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.IKeyboardListener.CanBecomeFirstResponder
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the view can become the first responder to listen the keyboard actions.
member.remarks: This property will be considered only in iOS Platform.
Enabling this property alone will not listen to keyboard activity; you must additionally add a keyboard listener and the view must be in focus.

summary.para: To convert a view to a stream in a specific file format, the GetStreamAsync method is used. Currently, the supported file formats are JPEG or PNG .
To get the stream for the view in PNG file format, use await view.GetStreamAsync(ImageFileFormat.Png);
To get the stream for the view in JPEG file format, use await view.GetStreamAsync(ImageFileFormat.Jpeg);
summary.remarks: The view's stream can only be rendered when the view is added to the visual tree.

summary.para: To save a view as an image in the desired file format, the SaveAsImage is used.Currently, the supported image formats are JPEG or PNG .
By default, the image format is PNG .For example, view.SaveAsImage("Test");
Saved location: For Windows, Android, and Mac , the image will be saved in the Pictures folder , and for iOS , the image will be saved in the Photos Album folder .

remarks.para: In Windows and Mac , when you save an image with an already existing filename, the existing file is replaced with a new file, but the filename remains the same.
In iOS , due to its platform limitation, the image will be saved with the default filename, for example, IMG_001.jpeg, IMG_002.png and more.

summary.remarks: The view can be saved as an image only when the view is added to the visual tree.

member.summary: To render the image as a stream in desired file format.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfWindowOverlay
member.summary:
The allows the users to add or update an independent to float above the application window. The AddOrUpdate() methods allows you to position it both absolutely and relatively.
The passed view is eliminated from the floating window via the Remove() function. Using the RemoveFromWindow() method, you can also delete all floating views.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the application windows and adds a new overlay stack for including the independent views.

member.summary: Calculates a new absolute position based on the given alignment and size.

member.summary: Calculates a new relative position based on the given alignment, relative view size, and child size.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfWindowOverlay.CreateStack
member.summary: Returns a .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfWindowOverlay.AddOrUpdate(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View,System.Double,System.Double,Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.WindowOverlayHorizontalAlignment,Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.WindowOverlayVerticalAlignment)
member.summary: Adds or updates the child layout absolutely to the overlay stack.
member.param: Adds the child to the floating window.
Positions the child in the x point from the application left.
Positions the child in the y point from the application top.

The horizontal alignment behaves as like below,
For , the child left position will starts from the x.
For , the child right position will starts from the x.
For , the child center position will be the x.

The vertical alignment behaves as like below,
For , the child top position will starts from the y.
For , the child bottom position will starts from the y.
For , the child center position will be the y.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.SfWindowOverlay.AddOrUpdate(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View,Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View,System.Double,System.Double,Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.WindowOverlayHorizontalAlignment,Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.WindowOverlayVerticalAlignment)
member.summary: Adds or updates the child layout relatively to the overlay stack. After the relative positioning, the x and y will the added with the left and top positions.
member.param: Adds the child to the floating window.
Positions the child relatively to the relative view.
Adds the x point to the child left after the relative positioning.
Adds the y point to the child top after the relative positioning.

The horizontal alignment behaves as like below,
For , the child left position will starts from the relative.Left.
For , the child right position will starts from the relative.Right.
For , the child center position will be the relative.Center.

The vertical alignment behaves as like below,
For , the child bottom position will starts from the relative.Top.
For , the child top position will starts from the relative.Bottom.
For , the child center position will be the relative.Center.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout
member.summary: Arranges child elements using a docking pattern, allowing a flexible layout design.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.DockProperty
member.summary: Identifies the attached property for a View, determining the docking position of a child view within the , such as None, Left, Top, Right, or Bottom.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.ShouldExpandLastChildProperty
member.summary: Determines whether the last child in the layout should automatically expand to fill the remaining space. The default value is true.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.HorizontalSpacingProperty
member.summary: Sets the between the docked views in the layout.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.VerticalSpacingProperty
member.summary: Sets the between the docked views in the layout.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.ShouldExpandLastChild
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the last visible child in the should expand to fill the remaining available space.
member.value: A value that determines whether the last child expands to occupy unused layout space. The default value is true.
member.remarks: When set to true, any unoccupied space in the layout is automatically assigned to the last visible child. This is useful for creating responsive and adaptive layouts that scale gracefully to different screen sizes.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.HorizontalSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal gap between child elements within the layout.
member.value: A value that specifies the spacing between elements horizontally. The default value is 0.
member.remarks: This property controls the amount of horizontal space between elements in the layout. It helps manage consistent spacing and alignment, particularly when creating adaptive UIs.
member.example:
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-5)
<dx:SfDockLayout HorizontalSpacing="10"> </dx:SfDockLayout>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-6)
SfDockLayout dockLayout = new SfDockLayout(){ HorizontalSpacing = 10 };

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfDockLayout.VerticalSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical gap between child elements within the layout.
member.value: A value that specifies the spacing between elements vertically. The default value is 0.
member.remarks: This property controls the amount of vertical space between elements in the layout. It ensures proper visual separation and improves the readability and usability of the interface.
member.example:
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-7)
<dx:SfDockLayout VerticalSpacing="8"> </dx:SfDockLayout>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-8)
SfDockLayout dockLayout = new SfDockLayout(){ VerticalSpacing = 8 };

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfEffectsView.TouchDownCommandParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter to pass to the .
member.value: Specifies the parameter of the touch down command in EffectsView. The default value is null.
member.example:
The following example shows how to apply the touch down command parameter for the effects view.
<effectsView:SfEffectsView x:Name="sfEffectsView" TouchDownCommand="{Binding TouchDownCommand}" TouchDownCommandParameter="{x:Reference sfEffectsView}"> <effectsView:SfEffectsView.Content> <Button Text="Content" WidthRequest="120" HeightRequest="60"/> </effectsView:SfEffectsView.Content> </effectsView:SfEffectsView>

member.value: Specifies the parameter of the long pressed command in EffectsView. The default value is null.
member.example:
The following example shows how to apply the long pressed command parameter for the effects view.
<effectsView:SfEffectsView x:Name="sfEffectsView" LongPressedCommand="{Binding LongPressedCommand}" LongPressedCommandParameter="{x:Reference sfEffectsView}"> <effectsView:SfEffectsView.Content> <Button Text="Content" WidthRequest="120" HeightRequest="60"/> </effectsView:SfEffectsView.Content> </effectsView:SfEffectsView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Core.SfEffectsView.TouchUpCommandParameter

member.value: Specifies the parameter of the touch up command in EffectsView. The default value is null.
member.example:

<effectsView:SfEffectsView x:Name="sfEffectsView" TouchUpCommand="{Binding TouchUpCommand}" TouchUpCommandParameter="{x:Reference sfEffectsView}"> <effectsView:SfEffectsView.Content> <Button Text="Content" WidthRequest="120" HeightRequest="60"/> </effectsView:SfEffectsView.Content> </effectsView:SfEffectsView>

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration of the wave animation in milliseconds.
member.value: The default value of is 1000.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the AnimationDuration property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" AnimationDuration="1500"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
Shimmer.AnimationDuration = 1500;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.Fill
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color of shimmer view.
member.value: The default value of is "#F3EDF6".
member.remarks: If the brush is a gradient brush then it only applies the first color.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the Fill property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-3)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" Fill="AliceBlue"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-4)
Shimmer.Fill = Brush.AliceBlue;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.CustomView
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom view that is used for loading view.
member.value: The default value of is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to load actual content of shimmer.
member.value: The default value of is true.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the IsActive property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-7)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" IsActive="True"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-8)
Shimmer.IsActive = true;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.WaveColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the shimmer wave color.
member.value: The default value of is "#FFFBFE".
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the WaveColor property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-9)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" WaveColor="AliceBlue"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-10)
Shimmer.WaveColor = Colors.AliceBlue;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.WaveWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the wave.
member.value: The default value of is 200.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the WaveWidth property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-11)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" WaveWidth="150"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-12)
Shimmer.WaveWidth = 150;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the built-in shimmer view type.
member.value: The default value of is .
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the Type property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-13)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" Type="Article"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-14)
Shimmer.Type = ShimmerType.Article;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.WaveDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets the animation direction for Shimmer.
member.value: The default value of is .
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the WaveDirection property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-15)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" WaveDirection="RightToLeft"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-16)
Shimmer.WaveDirection = ShimmerWaveDirection.RightToLeft;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Shimmer.SfShimmer.RepeatCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of times the built-in view should be repeated.
member.value: The default value of is 1.
member.remarks: The repeat count is applicable only for the built-in views and not for the custom view.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the RepeatCount property in the Shimmer. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-17)
<shimmer:SfShimmer x:Name="Shimmer" RepeatCount="2"> </shimmer:SfShimmer>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-18)
Shimmer.RepeatCount = 2;

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Themes.SyncfusionThemeResourceDictionary
member.summary: Represents a collection of theme resources for Syncfusion controls.
member.remarks: This class is used to include various themes for Syncfusion controls. Themes can be added to this ResourceDictionary to apply consistent styling across the application.

member.summary: Gets or sets the visual theme for the Syncfusion control.
member.value: Accepts an value, with the default being .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Themes.SyncfusionThemeResourceDictionary.UpdateVisualTheme
member.summary: Updates the application's visual theme by applying the appropriate resource dictionaries based on the current theme setting.
member.remarks: This method clears any previously applied theme resources and loads the resource dictionaries corresponding to the selected visual theme.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Themes.SyncfusionThemeResourceDictionary.UpdateDefaultTheme(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates the merged resource dictionaries to apply the default theme based on the specified options.
member.param: true to apply the dark theme; otherwise, false to apply the light theme. The default is false.
true to use the Cupertino-style theme; otherwise, false to use the Material-style theme. The default is false.

member.summary: Static Theme Resource Extension is a Markup Extension for simple key mapping in resource components.

The following example shows how to map a key with another key. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<local:StaticThemeResource x:Key="BadgeSettingsBackground" ResourceKey="SyncfusionPrimaryLightColor"/>
***
